Neuralflow AI

Democratizing machine learning for enterprise applications

INTERN MACHINE LEARNING ENGINEER

San Francisco, CA (Hybrid) · Internship · $22-26 per hour

We are seeking a talented Machine Learning Engineer Intern to join our ML Infrastructure team. In this role, you
will gain hands-on experience building and optimizing machine learning models, working with production ML

pipelines, and collaborating with experienced engineers to solve real-world ML challenges. You'll contribute to
projects spanning model training, deployment, and monitoring while learning best practices in machine learning
engineering.

ABOUT US

Neuralflow AI is a fast-growing machine learning platform company based in San Francisco that helps enterprises
build, train, and deploy production-grade ML models at scale. We provide end-to-end ML infrastructure and

tooling that simplifies the entire ML lifecycle, from data preparation to model monitoring. Our mission is to make
advanced machine learning accessible to organizations of all sizes.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Assist in developing and training machine learning models using PyTorch and TensorFlow on real-world

datasets

Help implement feature engineering pipelines using Featuretools and collaborate on data processing tasks

Participate in model experimentation and tracking using MLflow to log metrics, parameters, and model

artifacts

Support the deployment and testing of ML models on AWS SageMaker, including managing model versions

and inference endpoints

Write clean, well-documented Python code and participate in code reviews with the team

Monitor model performance metrics and alert team members to potential data drift or model degradation

Contribute to documentation and create sample notebooks demonstrating ML workflows for internal use

Attend team meetings, learning sessions, and present findings on model experiments and improvements

REQUIRED

Currently pursuing or recently completed a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics,
Mathematics, or related field

Strong programming skills in Python with solid understanding of object-oriented programming principles

 Foundational knowledge of machine learning concepts including supervised learning, classification, and
regression

Familiarity with at least one ML framework (TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn) through coursework or

personal projects

NICE TO HAVE

Prior internship or project experience with machine learning or data science applications

Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud Platform, or Azure) or familiarity with
containerization (Docker)

Knowledge of ML operations (MLOps) best practices, model versioning, or experiment tracking tools

TECH STACK

Python   PyTorch   TensorFlow   MLflow   AWS SageMaker

  Featuretools

  Pandas & NumPy   Docker

  Git/GitHub

Jupyter Notebooks

BENEFITS

Competitive hourly internship compensation with potential for return offer

Flexible work schedule accommodating academic calendar and course load

Comprehensive onboarding and mentorship from senior ML engineers

Access to cutting-edge ML tools, GPUs, and cloud computing resources

HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your resume, a cover letter describing your interest in machine learning, and a link to your GitHub
profile or portfolio (if available) to careers@neuralflow.ai with the subject line 'ML Engineer Intern Application'.

Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. We encourage students and recent graduates to apply!
